# optionAll | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Graphics ](/documentation/coregraphics)

- [ CGWindowListOption ](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption)

- [ CGWindowListOption ](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption)

-  optionAll 

Type Property# optionAll

Mac CatalystmacOS

```
static var optionAll: CGWindowListOption { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption/optionall#Discussion)

List all windows, including both onscreen and offscreen windows. When retrieving a list with this option, the `relativeToWindow` parameter should be set to [`kCGNullWindowID`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgnullwindowid).
